steps.text: Reading SPEC.md: it mandates round-half-to-even (banker's rounding), not Math.round. Implementing accordingly in src/round.js.

steps.done: Implemented roundHalfEven with round-half-to-even per SPEC.md (halves -> nearest even). Verified the distinguishing cases that a Math.round half-up impl would fail (0.5->0, 2.5->2).
